export const anotherFormula = `

    <h1><span style={{
        "color": "#2B46A5",
        "fontSize": "40px",
        "fontWeight": "bold"
      }}>{`CUSTOMIZATION`}</span></h1>
    <h2>{`Development`}</h2>
    <p>{`The initial idea behind preparing the development environment is to avoid
disrupting my host environment and I even prefer not to config the host machine.`}</p>
    <p>{`Up until now, the only method I have found to connect to Docker and use this
Docker container as a development environment is through Visual Studio Code.
What seems hilarious is that even paid products like Intellij IDEA do not
implement “remote connect”; instead, they implement “remote debug.” Since users
cannot directly run the IDE inside the container, “remote debug” is not
equivalent to “remote connect” in any cases.`}</p>
    <h3>{`Docker`}</h3>
    <p>{`Here I prepare a Dockerfile and a Bash script.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`bluephoeniix@bluephoeniiix:~/dev/blue-phoeniiix-site-env$ tree
.
├── Dockerfile
└── install.sh

0 directories, 2 files
`}</code></pre>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-Dockerfile"
      }}>{`FROM ubuntu:latest
WORKDIR /init
COPY install.sh /init/
`}</code></pre>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-bash"
      }}>{`#!/bin/bash

echo "nameserver 8.8.8.8" | tee /etc/resolv.conf >/dev/null

apt-get update -y &&
    apt-get install wget curl git nano zsh -y &&
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

apt-get upgrade -y

echo "n" | sh -c "$(wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh -O -)"

wget -qO- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.5/install.sh | bash

echo 'export NVM_DIR="$([ -z "\${XDG_CONFIG_HOME-}" ] && printf %s "\${HOME}/.nvm" || printf %s "\${XDG_CONFIG_HOME}/nvm")"' | tee -a ~/.bashrc >/dev/null
echo '[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \\. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" # This loads nvm' | tee -a ~/.bashrc >/dev/null

export NVM_DIR="$([ -z "\${XDG_CONFIG_HOME-}" ] && printf %s "\${HOME}/.nvm" || printf %s "\${XDG_CONFIG_HOME}/nvm")"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \\. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"

if [ -n "$NVM_DIR" ] && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ]; then
    echo -e "\\e[34m nvm installations complete \\e[0m"
else
    echo -e "\\e[31m nvm failed \\e[0m"
    exec bash
fi

nvm install 18 && nvm use 18 && npm install -g yarn && yarn set version 3.3.0

git clone https://github.com/carbon-design-system/gatsby-theme-carbon.git

cd gatsby-theme-carbon && yarn install
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Then build the image:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-bash"
      }}>{`docker build -t ibm-gatsby-carbon .
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Once the image built is ready, run the image:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-bash"
      }}>{`docker run -i -t -p 8000:8000 ibm-gatsby-carbon /bin/bash
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Attach Visual Studio Code, and then you can start development.`}</p>
    <p>{`Ensure that you use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`bash`}</inlineCode>{` because I prefer `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`zsh`}</inlineCode>{` for personal favor, and I
haven’t transferred environment variables and you need to run:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-bash"
      }}>{`bash install.sh
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`manually. (inside `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/init`}</inlineCode>{` folder)`}</p>
    <h2>{`Modifications`}</h2>
    <p>{`You need to do tons of modifications to this default template, I only introduce
the necessity.`}</p>
    <br></br>
    <span style={{
      "color": "#8338EC",
      "fontSize": "15px",
      "fontWeight": "bold"
    }}>
  PLUS, I don't care about front-end code's neatness and readability, belows are
  black magic.
    </span>
    <h3>{`Disable Banner`}</h3>
    <p>{`In `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/packages/example/src/styles`}</inlineCode>{`, replace `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Layout.module.scss`}</inlineCode>{` to this:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-scss"
      }}>{`.layout-no-banner :global {
  .cds--header {
    top: 0;
  }
  [class*='leftNavWrapper'] {
    top: 0;
    // Prevents left nav jitter on page change
    transition: none;
  }
  [class*='Switcher-module--nav'] {
    top: 3rem;
  }
  [class*='PageTabs-module--tabs-container'] {
    top: 3rem;
  }
  [class*='filter-row'] {
    top: 7rem;
  }
  .color-token-table .cds--sticky-container-visible {
    top: 7rem;
  }
  .cds--typeset-style-container .cds--sticky-container-visible {
    top: 4rem;
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Replace `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`packages/gatsby-theme-carbon/src/components/Header/Header.js`}</inlineCode>{`’s
contents into:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`import React, { useContext } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'gatsby';
import {
  Header as ShellHeader,
  HeaderMenuButton,
  SkipToContent,
  HeaderGlobalBar,
  HeaderGlobalAction,
} from '@carbon/react';
import { Switcher, Close } from '@carbon/react/icons';
import cx from 'classnames';

import HeaderNav from '../HeaderNav/HeaderNav';
import GlobalSearch from '../GlobalSearch';
import NavContext from '../../util/context/NavContext';
import useMetadata from '../../util/hooks/useMetadata';

import * as styles from './Header.module.scss';

const Header = ({ children }) => {
  const {
    leftNavIsOpen,
    toggleNavState,
    switcherIsOpen,
    searchIsOpen,
    switcherTooltipText = '',
  } = useContext(NavContext);
  const { isSearchEnabled, navigationStyle, isSwitcherEnabled } = useMetadata();

  return (
    <ShellHeader
      aria-label="Header"
      className={cx(styles.header, {
        [styles.headerWithHeaderNav]: navigationStyle,
      })}>
      <SkipToContent href="#main-content" className={styles.skipToContent} />
      <HeaderMenuButton
        className={cx(\`cds--header__action--menu\`, styles.headerButton)}
        aria-label="Open menu"
        onClick={() => {
          toggleNavState('leftNavIsOpen');
          toggleNavState('switcherIsOpen', 'close');
        }}
        isActive={leftNavIsOpen}
      />
      <Link
        className={cx(styles.headerName, {
          [styles.searchIsOpenOnLink]: searchIsOpen,
          [styles.headerNameWithHeaderNav]: navigationStyle,
        })}
        to="/">
        {children}
      </Link>
      {navigationStyle && <HeaderNav />}
      <HeaderGlobalBar
        className={cx({ [styles.searchIsOpenOnBar]: searchIsOpen })}>
        {isSearchEnabled && <GlobalSearch />}
        {isSwitcherEnabled && (
          <HeaderGlobalAction
            className={cx(styles.headerButton, styles.switcherButton, {
              [styles.switcherButtonOpen]: switcherIsOpen,
            })}
            aria-label={switcherTooltipText}
            tooltipAlignment="end"
            onClick={() => {
              toggleNavState('switcherIsOpen');
              toggleNavState('searchIsOpen', 'close');
              toggleNavState('leftNavIsOpen', 'close');
            }}>
            {switcherIsOpen ? <Close size={20} /> : <Switcher size={20} />}
          </HeaderGlobalAction>
        )}
      </HeaderGlobalBar>
    </ShellHeader>
  );
};

const DefaultHeaderText = () => (
  <>
    Carbon&nbsp;<span>Design System</span>
  </>
);

Header.defaultProps = {
  children: <DefaultHeaderText />,
};

export default Header;
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Most importantly, replace `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`packages/example/src/styles/index.scss`}</inlineCode>{`’s contents
into:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{

#gatsby-focus-wrapper {

}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3>{`Remove IBM Logo`}</h3>
    <p>{`IBM Carbon uses apache 2.0. The Apache 2.0 license does not guarantee the legality of using trademarks associated with the organization to which its creator belongs. In other words, while users have the freedom to legally use the software, it does not imply the right to use any trademarks contained in the software. The interpretation rights of these trademarks are not encompassed within the Apache 2.0 license.`}</p>
    <p>{`To do so, modify `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`node_modules/gatsby-theme-carbon/src/components/Footer/Footer.js`}</inlineCode>{` file:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`import React from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import { useStaticQuery, graphql } from 'gatsby';
import { Row, Grid, Column } from '../Grid';
import {
  footer,
  grid,
  nav,
  listItem,
  logo,
  content,
} from './Footer.module.scss';

const Footer = ({ Content, links, Logo }) => {
  const { firstCol, secondCol } = links;
  const { site } = useStaticQuery(graphql\`
    query BUILD_TIME_QUERY {
      site {
        buildTime(formatString: "DD MMMM YYYY")
      }
    }
  \`);
  return (
    <footer className={footer}>
      <Grid className={grid}>
        <Row>
          <Column colLg={2} colMd={2}>
            <ul className={nav}>
              {firstCol &&
                firstCol.map((link, i) => (
                  <li key={i} className={listItem}>
                    <a href={link.href} aria-label={link.linkText}>
                      {link.linkText}
                    </a>
                  </li>
                ))}
            </ul>
          </Column>
          <Column colLg={2} colMd={2}>
            <ul className={nav}>
              {secondCol &&
                secondCol.map((link, i) => (
                  <li key={i} className={listItem}>
                    <a href={link.href} aria-label={link.linkText}>
                      {link.linkText}
                    </a>
                  </li>
                ))}
            </ul>
          </Column>
          <Column
            className={content}
            colLg={4}
            colMd={4}
            colSm={3}
            offsetLg={2}>
            <Content buildTime={site.buildTime} />
          </Column>
        </Row>
        <Row>
          <Column colLg={3}>
            <Logo />
          </Column>
        </Row>
      </Grid>
    </footer>
  );
};

const IBMLogo = () => (
  <svg>
  </svg>
);

const DefaultContent = () => (
  <p>
    Shadow this content by importing the theme Footer and supplying your own
    props.
  </p>
);

Footer.defaultProps = {
  links: {
    firstCol: [
      { href: 'https://www.ibm.com/design', linkText: 'Sample' },
      { href: 'https://www.ibm.com/design', linkText: 'Links' },
      {
        href: 'https://www.ibm.com/design',
        linkText: 'Column',
      },
      { href: 'https://www.ibm.com/design', linkText: 'One' },
    ],
    secondCol: [
      {
        href: 'https://www.ibm.com/design',
        linkText: 'Dribbble',
      },
      {
        href: 'https://www.ibm.com/design',
        linkText: 'Medium',
      },
      {
        href: 'https://www.ibm.com/design',
        linkText: 'Twitter',
      },
    ],
  },
  Content: DefaultContent,
  Logo: IBMLogo,
};

Footer.propTypes = {
  /**
   * Specify the first and second columns of your links
   */
  links: PropTypes.exact({
    firstCol: PropTypes.arrayOf(
      PropTypes.shape({
        href: PropTypes.string,
        linkText: PropTypes.string,
      })
    ),
    secondCol: PropTypes.arrayOf(
      PropTypes.shape({
        href: PropTypes.string,
        linkText: PropTypes.string,
      })
    ),
  }),

  /**
   * Specify the first and second columns of your links
   */
  Content: PropTypes.elementType,

  /**
   * Provide a logo to be rendered in the bottom left corner
   */
  Logo: PropTypes.elementType,
};

export default Footer;
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Replace the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`<svg>`}</inlineCode>{` of your own.`}</p>
    <h3>{`Remove Redundant Switcher`}</h3>
    <p>{`In `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`packages/gatsby-theme-carbon/src/components/Switcher`}</inlineCode>{`, replace `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Switcher.js`}</inlineCode>{`
into this:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`import React, { useContext, useRef, useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import cx from 'classnames';
import useMedia from 'use-media';
import { Locked } from '@carbon/react/icons';
import NavContext from '../../util/context/NavContext';
import { nav, open, divider, link, linkDisabled } from './Switcher.module.scss';

const Switcher = ({ children }) => {
  const lgBreakpoint = useMedia('min-width: 1056px');
  const { switcherIsOpen, toggleNavState } = useContext(NavContext);
  const listRef = useRef(null);
  const [height, setHeight] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const collapseOpenNavs = function (e) {
      if (e.which === 27) {
        toggleNavState('switcherIsOpen', 'close');
      }
    };

    document.addEventListener('keyup', collapseOpenNavs);

    return function cleanup() {
      document.removeEventListener('keyup', collapseOpenNavs);
    };
  }, [toggleNavState]);

  // calculate and update height
  useEffect(() => {
    if (switcherIsOpen) {
      setHeight(listRef.current.offsetHeight + 40);
    } else {
      setHeight(0);
    }
  }, [listRef, switcherIsOpen]);

  const maxHeight = !lgBreakpoint && switcherIsOpen ? '100%' : \`\${height}px\`;

  return (
    <nav
      className={cx(nav, { [open]: switcherIsOpen })}
      aria-label=""
      tabIndex="-1"
      style={{ maxHeight }}>
      <ul ref={listRef}>{children}</ul>
    </nav>
  );
};

export const SwitcherDivider = (props) => (
  <li className={divider}>
    <span {...props} />
  </li>
);

export const SwitcherLink = ({
  disabled,
  children,
  isInternal,
  href: hrefProp,
  ...rest
}) => {
  const href = disabled || !hrefProp ? undefined : hrefProp;
  const className = disabled ? linkDisabled : link;
  const { switcherIsOpen } = useContext(NavContext);
  const openTabIndex = disabled ? '-1' : 0;

  return (
    <li>
      <a
        aria-disabled={disabled}
        role="button"
        tabIndex={switcherIsOpen ? openTabIndex : '-1'}
        className={className}
        href={href}
        {...rest}>
        {children}
        {isInternal && <Locked />}
      </a>
    </li>
  );
};

// https://css-tricks.com/using-css-transitions-auto-dimensions/
// Note: if you change this, update the max-height in the switcher stylesheet
const DefaultChildren = () => (
  <>
    <SwitcherDivider>NA</SwitcherDivider>
    <SwitcherLink href="" isInternal>
      Switcher Not Implementated
    </SwitcherLink>
  </>
);

Switcher.defaultProps = {
  children: <DefaultChildren />,
};

export default Switcher;
`}</code></pre>
    <h3>{`Math`}</h3>
    <h4>{`Alternative Solution For Math Typing`}</h4>
    <p>{`Although IBM Carbon doesn’t support Katex in MDX originally, but it does support span object rendering in MDX, so here I took a very simple new project for testing a specially Katex website, whose just allows me copy and paste the span object converted from Markdown Math input.`}</p>
    <p>{`However, it seems that Katex did not always get correct rendering cause there always has some elements appear as text beside the bottom of the formulars.`}</p>
    <p>{`So that it comes another idea, I change to use MathJax which is a more fundamental rendering method.`}</p>
    <p>{`Allow me copy some words from Google Group:`}</p>
    <p>{`“Partially. KaTeX is purely about TeX/LaTeX input and HTML output, whereas MathJax also processes MathML and AsciiMath (two other math formats), and produces output not just in HTML but also SVG and MathML. MathJax is also deeply involved with making mathematics on the web be accessible to users with assistive technology needs (e.g., generating speech text for the math, or braille output for it, and providing interactive exploration of the math, etc.). While KaTeX does include hidden MathML output for screen readers, assistive support is not central to it. So MathJax has broader goals.”`}</p>
    <p>{`Below here shows a very dummy solution:`}</p>
    <p>{`To display a formular `}<AnotherFormulaComponent mdxType="AnotherFormulaComponent" />{` in MathJax for pure copying, I create a new blank project only containes an HTML Page.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<title>MathJax TeX Test Page</title>
<script type="text/x-mathjax-config">
  MathJax.Hub.Config({tex2jax: {inlineMath: [['$','$'], ['\\\\(','\\\\)']]}});
</script>
<script type="text/javascript"
  src="http://cdn.mathjax.org/mathjax/latest/MathJax.js?config=TeX-AMS-MML_HTMLorMML">
</script>
</head>
<body>
$$x = {-b \\pm \\sqrt{b^2-4ac} \\over 2a}.$$
</body>
</html>
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`By opening this page in browser, right click the rendered math formular to get the plain MathML code:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block">
  <mi>x</mi>
  <mo>=</mo>
  <mrow class="MJX-TeXAtom-ORD">
    <mfrac>
      <mrow>
        <mo>&#x2212;<!-- − --></mo>
        <mi>b</mi>
        <mo>&#x00B1;<!-- ± --></mo>
        <msqrt>
          <msup>
            <mi>b</mi>
            <mn>2</mn>
          </msup>
          <mo>&#x2212;<!-- − --></mo>
          <mn>4</mn>
          <mi>a</mi>
          <mi>c</mi>
        </msqrt>
      </mrow>
      <mrow>
        <mn>2</mn>
        <mi>a</mi>
      </mrow>
    </mfrac>
  </mrow>
  <mo>.</mo>
</math>
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`And then make sure it is inserted in JSX:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`export const anotherFormula = \`
<math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block">
  <mi>x</mi>
  <mo>=</mo>
  <mrow class="MJX-TeXAtom-ORD">
    <mfrac>
      <mrow>
        <mo>&#x2212;<!-- − --></mo>
        <mi>b</mi>
        <mo>&#x00B1;<!-- ± --></mo>
        <msqrt>
          <msup>
            <mi>b</mi>
            <mn>2</mn>
          </msup>
          <mo>&#x2212;<!-- − --></mo>
          <mn>4</mn>
          <mi>a</mi>
          <mi>c</mi>
        </msqrt>
      </mrow>
      <mrow>
        <mn>2</mn>
        <mi>a</mi>
      </mrow>
    </mfrac>
  </mrow>
  <mo>.</mo>
</math>
\`;

export const AnotherFormulaComponent = () => (
  <div style={{
      whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
      display: 'inline-block',
    }}  dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: anotherFormula   }} />

`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`To use this component, all I need to do is:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-md"
      }}>{`- I don't know this <AnotherFormulaComponent />
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`It will be displayed like this: `}<AnotherFormulaComponent mdxType="AnotherFormulaComponent" /></p>

    <p>{`Make sure to cancel `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`style`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <h3>{`Dark Theme`}</h3>
    <p>{`IBM Carbon has the feature of Dark Theme while IBM Carbon Gatsby does not, to enable Dark Theme, you need to hand craft pages.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-bash"
      }}>{`root@2927557758c1:/init/dev/packages/example/src/pages/buildsite# tree
.
|-- BG.jpg
|-- Template.js
|-- customization.mdx
|-- howthissitewasbuilt.mdx
\`-- template.scss
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`template.js`}</inlineCode>{` is a copy and paste from `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Homepage.js`}</inlineCode></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`import React from 'react';
import { HomepageBanner } from 'gatsby-theme-carbon';
import HomepageTemplate from 'gatsby-theme-carbon/src/templates/Homepage';
import BG from './BG.jpg';


const BannerText = () => {
  const paragraphStyle = {
    fontSize: '70px',
    fontWeight: 'bold',
    color: '#FEE440',
  };
  return <p style={paragraphStyle}>HOW THIS SITE WAS BUILD</p>;
};

const customProps = {
  Banner: <HomepageBanner renderText={BannerText} image={BG} />,
};

// spreading the original props gives us props.children (mdx content)
function ShadowedHomepage(props) {
  return <HomepageTemplate {...props} {...customProps} />;
}

export default ShadowedHomepage;
`}</code></pre>
    <h4>{`Issue: No Previous`}</h4>
    <p>{`It will result in site loses ‘Previous’ Button, because `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`HomePage`}</inlineCode>{` doesn’t have a previous page.`}</p>
    <h3>{`How To DIY mdx styles`}</h3>
    <p>{`use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`<span>`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`style`}</inlineCode>{` in mdx file:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<span style="color: #003FA3; font-size: 40px; font-weight: bold;">
  foo and bar
</span>
`}</code></pre>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
;
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true;
